headline: Mosaic’s Brazil Rare Earths Plan Adds Longer Term Offset To Fertilizers
summary: Mosaic (NYSE:MOS) reports that its rare earths joint venture in Brazil has advanced to the prefeasibility stage. The company is targeting construction of the project to start in 2027. The venture focuses on extracting rare earth elements from existing operations in Brazil. Mosaic, best known for its phosphate and potash fertilizers, is moving into rare earths at a time when demand for these materials is closely watched by manufacturers and governments. The Brazil joint venture ties rare...
